Hi, I'm Harendra 👋

I am Harendra Kumar Sah, a frontend developer, system/network enthusiast, and the CEO of Informatic EduPath. I create responsive, user-friendly, and visually engaging web experiences. Skilled in Nuxt.js, Vue.js, and Tailwind CSS, I turn ideas into functional and elegant digital solutions. On the systems and network side, I manage Active Directory users, deploy monitoring tools like LibreNMS and Zabbix, handle switches from Cisco and MikroTik, and implement software restrictions and firewalls using Fortinet and Sophos. Always learning, I aim to build applications and infrastructures that are technically solid and seamless across all devices.

Education 🎓

  • BSc (Hons) CIT – AITM College, Kathmandu
  • +2 Computer Science – Bridgewater International College, Sinamangal, Kathmandu
  • SEE – Little Star English School, Lahan, Siraha
